title: Fallback rate by reason
description: Counts of fail-soft LLM fallbacks bucketed by the D-65 reason enum. Target: total fallback rate <5% weekly per AI-SPEC §7 KPIs.
query_recipe: Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-fallback' → Filter span_name='eldritch.monster.decision' AND eldritch.fallback.reason IS NOT NULL → Count spans grouped by 'eldritch.fallback.reason' (timeout|json_parse|hallucinated_id|refusal|generic|rate_limit). Compare to total decision count for rate.
